title: Starfield - Terran Armada
anchor_summary: Story DLC for Starfield, so the clearest comp is the base game first: a single-player Bethesda-style first-person/open-world sci-fi RPG centered on questing, combat, exploration, loot, progression, and faction/story content. Closest neighbors are other first-person open-world RPGs with strong questlines and player-build progression, especially sci-fi or Bethesda-format sandboxes.

similar_games.title: Starfield
similar_games.why_similar: Terran Armada is additive story DLC that directly inherits Starfield’s first-person exploration, shooting, questing, progression, and spacefaring RPG structure.

similar_games.title: The Outer Worlds
similar_games.why_similar: Single-player first-person sci-fi RPG with hub-based exploration, dialogue-driven quests, shooting combat, loot, and character-build progression.

similar_games.title: Fallout 4
similar_games.why_similar: Bethesda-style first-person open-world RPG with quest-heavy exploration, gunplay, loot, crafting, and faction/story progression.

similar_games.title: Cyberpunk 2077
similar_games.why_similar: Narrative-driven first-person RPG blending shooter combat, gear progression, side quests, and build customization in a large-world sci-fi setting.

similar_games.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
similar_games.why_similar: Another Bethesda sandbox RPG built around open-ended exploration, faction questlines, loot, and player-driven character progression, despite melee/fantasy differences.
